mood: hushed optical drift, like an observatory plate laid over shallow water
lighting: soft overcast museum skylight with faint nocturnal blue depth and a few sharp specular pinpoints
object_inventory: one wide uninterrupted water-like textile field
partial stone-rim edge cuts entering from the border
sparse ceramic drift nodes and collision ovals
hairline wake arcs and ripple rings
tiny source-bearing apertures clustered at current intersections
negative_constraints: no desks, dashboards, cards, panels, browser chrome, labels, or legible words
no crowded archive wall or object inventory
no repeated source URL or duplicate post/image binding
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
